body:
I applied all the comments from the review - we now consistently use saturation excess threshold everywhere and follow the 1M microphysics dispatch pattern

Next in line from https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/issues/4285
title: Use saturation vapor pressure q_tot sink in 0M microphysics
